title: Bridge Essay: Visual mental imagery: Evidence for a heterarchical neural architecture.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imaginal — mental imagery as real perception, imagination activating sensory cortices, aphantasia.

**Visual mental imagery: Evidence for aheterarchical neural architecture.**. Phys Life Rev.. PMID: 38217888. DOI: 10.1016/j.plrev.2023.12.012. Theories of Visual Mental Imagery (VMI) emphasize the processes of retrieval, modification, and recombination of sensory information from long-term memory. Yet, only few studies have focused on the behavioral mechanisms and neural correlates supporting VMI of stimuli from different semantic domains.
